config.title: Kreator zapotrzebowania #if appvar_mode = MODE_BRAK_SUR na surowce #endif #if appvar_mode = MODE_BRAK_TOW na towary #endif #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'BulidDostawcaRow #include "50634"
'msgbox #include "50122"
'harui #include "50101"
'fire_choicelist #include "50200"
#include "50111"
'get_n_cena #include "50524"
'getcurrentfirma #include "50203"
dim g_eMode dim g_curSumIlZap dim g_iMaxPrec dim g_oIloscDict: set g_oIloscDict = createobject("Scripting.Dictionary")
function fopen : fopen = false g_eMode = trans_.var(APPVAR_MODE) select case g_eMode case 1 if not HARUI(UAR_CMDID(CMDID_RAPORT_ZLECPROD_SUROWCE_BRAK)) then exit function end if case 2 if not HARUI(UAR_CMDID(CMDID_RAPORT_TOWARY_BRAK)) then exit function end if end select
frefresh fopen = true end function
VB_PRINT_LANDSCAPE_COMMON
VB_PRINTPREV_LANDSCAPE_COMMON
function frefresh g_curSumIlZap = ccur(0.0) g_iMaxPrec = 0 page_.ctrl(CTRLID_FACTOR).value = ccur(100.0)
dim pModRapEngine : set pModRapEngine = doc_.getmodule(60108) dim pModPM : set pModPM = doc_.getmodule(60227) dim pPlanMag : set pPlanMag = pModPM.new_plan_mag_helper() dim utilProdHierarchy : set utilProdHierarchy = doc_.getmodule(60246) dim pProdHierarchy : set pProdHierarchy = utilProdHierarchy.new_prod_hierarchy()
dim pParamArray : set pParamArray = get_default_param(pPlanMag) if pModRapEngine.show_raport_param_dialog(pParamArray,"Kryteria selekcji") = 0 then exit function end if dim pPerforming : set pPerforming = doc_.performing("Trwa przygotowywanie danych...") pProdHierarchy.fill_on_prodgrupa_param pGrupaParam
dim oParamProdNazwa : set oParamProdNazwa = pParamArray.Value(3) dim oParamProdInx : set oParamProdInx = pParamArray.Value(4) dim strProduktFilter strProduktFilter = oParamProdNazwa.get_where_part(trans_) + " and " +_ oParamProdInx.get_where_part(trans_) +_ " and (t_prod.eAktywny=N5PRODUKT_AKTYWNY) and t_prod.pGrupaProd in (select tmp_group_idobj from #tmp_prod_hierarchy)"
pPlanMag.prefill strProduktFilter dim pParamMagazyny : set pParamMagazyny = pParamArray.Value(0) pPlanMag.update_stan pParamMagazyny dim pParamTerminFrwd : set pParamTerminFrwd = pParamArray.Value(1) dim dDateZamFirst,dDateZamLast #ifdef _ABAKUS pPlanMag.update_zam_wl_ex pParamTerminFrwd, pParamArray.Value(8) #else pPlanMag.update_zam_wl pParamTerminFrwd #endif #ifdef _ABAKUS pPlanMag.update_zam_ob_ex_2 pParamTerminFrwd,dDateZamFirst,dDateZamLast,pRejestrZamParam.get_where_part(trans_), pParamArray.Value(8) #else pPlanMag.update_zam_ob_ex pParamTerminFrwd,dDateZamFirst,dDateZamLast,pRejestrZamParam.get_where_part(trans_) #endif pPlanMag.update_z_prod pParamTerminFrwd pPlanMag.update_na_prod pParamTerminFrwd
dim pParamOkresBkwd : set pParamOkresBkwd = pParamArray.Value(2) dim dDateSprzFirst,dDateSprzLast #ifdef _ABAKUS pPlanMag.update_prog_sprz_ex pParamOkresBkwd,dDateSprzFirst,dDateSprzLast, pParamArray.Value(8) #else pPlanMag.update_prog_sprz pParamOkresBkwd,dDateSprzFirst,dDateSprzLast #endif pPlanMag.postprocess compute_factor(dDateZamFirst,dDateZamLast,dDateSprzFirst,dDateSprzLast)
fill_results pParamArray
set pProdHierarchy = nothing set utilProdHierarchy = nothing
pPlanMag.manual_done()
set pPlanMag = nothing set pModPM = nothing end function
function compute_factor(dDateZamFirst,dDateZamLast,dDateSprzFirst,dDateSprzLast) dim nSprzDays : nSprzDays = clng(dDateSprzLast) - clng(dDateSprzFirst) + 1 dim nZamDays : nZamDays = clng(dDateZamLast) - clng(dDateZamFirst) + 1 if nSprzDays = 0 then compute_factor = ccur(0.0) else compute_factor = ccur(ccur(nZamDays) / ccur(nSprzDays)) end if end function
function fill_results(byref pParamArray) '------ przelacznik decyduje czy pokazywac tylko te do zamowienia '------ czy wszystkie z ujemnym bilansem dim bAlwaysShow : bAlwaysShow = false
dim strHaving select case g_eMode case MODE_WSZYSTKO strHaving = "(1=1)" case MODE_BRAK_SUR strHaving = "sum(tpm_curIloscOpakNaProd) > 0.0 and sum(tpm_curIloscOpakAktBil) < min(t_opak.curIloscMin) " case MODE_BRAK_TOW strHaving = "sum(tpm_curIloscOpakAktBil) < min(t_opak.curIloscMin) " end select
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RESULT_TABLE)) pTB.section_body.removeall dim pCursor : set pCursor = trans_.createadors( _ "select 'c_prod_nazwa'=max(C_FIELD_PROD_FIRST_EXPR),'c_prod_indeks'=max(C_FIELD_PROD_SECOND_EXPR),'c_opak_nazwa'=max(t_opak.strNazwa)," +_ #ifdef APPCONFIG_ZAMOWIENIE_SHOW_CECHA1 "'c_marka'=max(t_prod.strCecha1)," +_ #endif "'c_stan'=isnull(sum(tpm_curIloscOpakStan),0)," +_ "'c_zamo'=isnull(sum(tpm_curIloscOpakZamOb),0)," +_ "'c_naprod'=isnull(sum(tpm_curIloscOpakNaProd),0)," +_ "'c_aktbil'=isnull(sum(tpm_curIloscOpakAktBil),0)," +_ "'c_zamwl'=isnull(sum(tpm_curIloscOpakZamWl),0)," +_ "'c_zprod'=isnull(sum(tpm_curIloscOpakZProd),0)," +_ "'c_progsp'=isnull(sum(tpm_curIloscOpakHistSp),0)," +_ "'c_progbil1'=isnull(sum(tpm_curIloscOpakProgBil1),0)," +_ "'c_progbil2'=isnull(sum(tpm_curIloscOpakProgBil2),0)," +_ "'c_customer'=isnull(max(t_prod.prod_pDostawca),0)," +_ "'c_skrot'=max(t_jedn.strSkrot),'c_dokl'=max(t_jedn.nDokladnosc),'c_wyr'=max(t_prod.prod_cWyrob),'c_sur'=max(t_prod.prod_cSurowiec), " +_ "'c_idprod'=tpm_pProdukt,'c_idopak'=tpm_pOpak,'c_stanmin'=min(t_opak.curIloscMin),'c_stanmax'=min(t_opak.curIloscMax) " +_ "from #tmp_planmag tpm " +_ "inner join n5produkt t_prod on tpm_pProdukt=t_prod.IdObj " +_ "inner join n5opakowanie_produktu t_opak on tpm_pOpak=t_opak.IdObj " +_ "inner join n5jednostka as t_jedn on t_opak.pJednOpak = t_jedn.IdObj " +_ "left outer join n5klient t_dost on t_prod.prod_pDostawca = t_dost.idobj " +_ "where t_prod.eRodzaj=N5PRODUKT_TOWAR and " + pParamArray.Value(3).get_where_part(trans_) +_ " and " + pParamArray.Value(4).get_where_part(trans_) +_ " and " + pParamArray.Value(5).get_where_part(trans_) +_ " group by tpm_pProdukt,tpm_pOpak " +_ "having " + strHaving + _ "order by c_prod_nazwa,c_opak_nazwa") dim nRecNr : nRecNr = 0 do while not pCursor.EOF
dim curStanMin : curStanMin = ccur(pCursor("c_stanmin")) dim curStanMax : curStanMax = ccur(pCursor("c_stanmax")) dim curProgBil1 : curProgBil1 = ccur(pCursor("c_progbil1")) dim curProgBil2 : curProgBil2 = ccur(pCursor("c_progbil2")) curProgBil2 = curProgBil2 - curStanMin
if bAlwaysShow or ((curProgBil2 < 0.0)) then
pTB.newrow pTB.row.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) if nRecNr mod 2 = 0 then pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_ROW_EVEN end if dim strSkrot : strSkrot = cstr(pCursor("c_skrot")) dim nDokl : nDokl = clng(pCursor("c_dokl")) - 1
pTB.newcell.addtext(cstr(nRecNr+1)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_CHECKBOX,-1 pTB.cell.keepline = true dim pCheckBox : set pCheckBox = pTB.element with pCheckBox .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") .border = 0 end with pTB.element.addnew CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1 'pusty tekst ("do zaznaczania") 'static z nazwą itd. dim pStatic : set pStatic = pTB.cell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX,-1) pStatic.text = cstr(pCursor("c_prod_nazwa")) dim idProd : idProd = clng(pCursor("c_idprod")) dim idOpak : idOpak = clng(pCursor("c_idopak"))
set pStatic.hli = doc_.createhlistr("OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT," + cstr(idProd)+",USAGE_VIEW)")
pTB.newcell pTB.cell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX,-1).text = cstr(pCursor("c_prod_indeks")) #ifdef APPCONFIG_ZAMOWIENIE_SHOW_CECHA1 pTB.newcell.addtext pCursor("c_marka") #endif pTB.newcell.addtext strSkrot strSkrot = "" pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(pCursor("c_stan"),strSkrot,nDokl)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(pCursor("c_zamo"),strSkrot,nDokl)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if pCursor("c_sur") = "1" then pTB.addtext doc_.afc.display.quantity(pCursor("c_naprod"),strSkrot,nDokl) end if dim curAktBil : curAktBil = ccur(pCursor("c_aktbil")) pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(curAktBil,strSkrot,nDokl)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.element.bold = true if curAktBil < 0.0 then pTB.element.forecolor = RGB(255,0,0) end if pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(pCursor("c_zamwl"),strSkrot,nDokl)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if pCursor("c_wyr") = "1" then pTB.addtext doc_.afc.display.quantity(pCursor("c_zprod"),strSkrot,nDokl) end if '-- stan min pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(curStanMin,strSkrot,nDokl)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(curStanMax,strSkrot,nDokl)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(pCursor("c_progsp"),strSkrot,nDokl)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(curProgBil1,strSkrot,nDokl)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.element.bold = true
if curProgBil1 < 0.0 then pTB.element.forecolor = RGB(255,0,0) pCheckBox.value = "1" end if
pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(curProgBil2,strSkrot,nDokl)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.element.bold = true
if curProgBil2 < 0.0 then pTB.element.forecolor = RGB(255,0,0) pCheckBox.value = "1" else '-- aby nie zamawiał ujemnych ilości curProgBil2 = ccur(0.0) end if '--------- zaokraglaj w górę wg receptur if curProgBil2 < 0.0 then if pCursor("c_wyr") = "1" then dim idDummyReceptura dim curIloscWyrobuZReceptury
if query_default_receptura_for_wyrob(idProd,idOpak, _ idDummyReceptura,curIloscWyrobuZReceptury) then 'curProgBil2 - ujemne 'Int(ujemne) = ceil(dodatnie) curProgBil2 = curIloscWyrobuZReceptury * Int(curProgBil2 / curIloscWyrobuZReceptury) end if else 'minimalna ilość zamawiana end if end if
pTB.newcell pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_CURRENCY , -1
dim ident_il with pTB.element .size=7 .precision = nDokl .unit = strSkrot .value = ccur(curProgBil2) * (-1) .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_REDIRECT_IL_ZAP) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") ident_il = .ident g_curSumIlZap = g_curSumIlZap + .value g_oIloscDict.Item(ident_il) = .value
if nDokl > g_iMaxPrec then g_iMaxPrec = nDokl end if end with
'teraz kontrolka (picture + edit) do wyboru klienta pTB.newcell.cell.keepline = true pTB.cell.styleitem = clng(STYLE_CTRL) pTB.cell.border = clng(0) pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE , -1 dim pPict:set pPict = pTB.element pPict.image = clng(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5KLIENT)
'wybor klienta niefiltrowany pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE , -1 dim pPict2:set pPict2 = pTB.element pPict2.image = clng(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5GRUPAKLIENT)
pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX , -1 dim pEdit:set pEdit = pTB.element pEdit.size = 15
if clng(pCursor("c_customer"))>0 then pEdit.value = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT , clng(pCursor("c_customer"))).text else pEdit.value = "" end if
dim hli_pict:set hli_pict = doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='choose_customer'") with hli_pict .prop(PRIV_PROP_EDIT_IDENT) = clng(pEdit.ident) .prop(PRIV_PROP_CHCK_IDENT) = clng(pCheckBox.ident) .prop(PRIV_PROP_FILTROWANIE) = clng(1) end with set pPict.hli = hli_pict pPict.tip = "Wybierz spośród dostawców danego produktu"
dim hli_pict2:set hli_pict2 = doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='choose_customer'") with hli_pict2 .prop(PRIV_PROP_EDIT_IDENT) = clng(pEdit.ident) .prop(PRIV_PROP_CHCK_IDENT) = clng(pCheckBox.ident) .prop(PRIV_PROP_FILTROWANIE) = clng(0) end with set pPict2.hli = hli_pict2 pPict2.tip = "Wybierz innego dostawcę"
set pCheckBox.userprop = doc_.createhli()
with pCheckBox.userprop .prop(PRIV_PROP_IDPROD) = idProd .prop(PRIV_PROP_IDOPAK) = clng(pCursor("c_idopak")) .prop(PRIV_PROP_BILANS) = ccur(curAktBil) .prop(PRIV_PROP_PROGNOZA1) = ccur(curProgBil1) .prop(PRIV_PROP_PROGNOZA2) = ccur(curProgBil2) .prop(PRIV_PROP_CTRL_ILOSC) = clng(ident_il) .prop(PRIV_PROP_CUSTOMER) = clng(pCursor("c_customer")) end with end if
pCursor.MoveNext nRecNr = nRecNr + 1 loop end function
function choose_customer(byref hli) dim pCheck:set pCheck = page_.ctrl(hli.prop(PRIV_PROP_CHCK_IDENT)) dim pEdit:set pEdit = page_.ctrl(hli.prop(PRIV_PROP_EDIT_IDENT)) dim bFiltr:bFiltr = (hli.prop(PRIV_PROP_FILTROWANIE) = 1)
'utworz where dla dostawcy dim idProd:idProd = pCheck.userprop.prop(PRIV_PROP_IDPROD) g_choicelist_idprod = idProd dim strWhere dim strWherePolRab strWherePolRab = " idobj in (select wpKlientGrupa from n5polrab where wpKlientGrupa_wrt = TYPEID_N5KLIENT and wpProdGrupa = " + cstr(idProd) + " and wpProdGrupa_wrt=TYPEID_N5PRODUKT )" if bFiltr then strWhere = "eAktywny=N5KLIENT_AKTYWNY and ( ( "+ strWherePolRab + " ) or ( idobj in (select p_pDostawca from vlist_n5zakup_listpozycje where c_pProdukt= "+ cstr(idProd) +" ) ) ) " else strWhere = "" end if #ifdef _DEBUG trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "DEBUG: " + strWhere #endif
dim nChoice if bFiltr then nChoice = fire_choice_list_custom (TYPEID_N5KLIENT,"Dostawca","",strWhere,"","", getref("BulidDostawcaRow") , true) else nChoice = fire_choice_list (TYPEID_N5KLIENT,"Dostawca","",strWhere,"","") end if
if nChoice > 0 then pCheck.userprop.prop(PRIV_PROP_CUSTOMER) = clng(nChoice) pEdit.value = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT , nChoice).text else pEdit.value = "" end if end function
dim pGrupaParam dim pRejestrZamParam
function get_default_param(byref pPlanMag) dim pParamArray : set pParamArray = doc_.afc.new_navoarray() 'wybór magazynów pParamArray.add pPlanMag.get_mag_filter_param()
'termin analizy 'w przód' pParamArray.add pPlanMag.get_termin_konc_param()
'termin analizy wstecz dim pParamOkresBkwd : set pParamOkresBkwd = pPlanMag.get_okres_sprz_param() ' pParamOkresBkwd.Mode = 7 'MODE_RANGE ' pParamOkresBkwd.first_value = DateAdd("m",-3,trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)) ' pParamOkresBkwd.last_value = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) pParamArray.add pParamOkresBkwd
'filtr na pokazywane produkty pParamArray.add doc_.afc.rap.param.new_text("Nazwa produktu").bindexpr("t_prod.strNazwa") pParamArray.add doc_.afc.rap.param.new_text("Indeks produktu").bindexpr("t_prod.strIndeks") 'dostawca pParamArray.add doc_.afc.rap.param.new_text("Dostawca").bindexpr("isnull(t_dost.strNazwa,'')")
set pGrupaParam = doc_.afc.rap.param.new_text("Grupa produktów").bindexpr("strNazwa") pParamArray.add pGrupaParam
dim pParamFactory2: set pParamFactory2= doc_.afc.rap.param Set pRejestrZamParam = pParamFactory2.new_choice("Rejestr zamówień obcych").bindexpr("idobj") doc_.afc.rap.param.init_on_query pRejestrZamParam, trans_ ,_ "select strNazwa , idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK__ZAM_OBCE) order by strNazwa " pParamArray.add pRejestrZamParam
#ifdef _ABAKUS 'rok ksiegowy dim pParamRok: set pParamRok = doc_.afc.rap.param dim pParamRokChoice : set pParamRokChoice = pParamRok.new_choice("Rok").bindexpr("year(p_dDataReal)") pParamRokChoice.multiple = true pParamRok.init_on_query pParamRokChoice, trans_,"select year(dDataRozp),year(dDataRozp) from n5rokksieg order by year(dDataRozp) desc" 'zaznacz aktualny rok dim iter for iter = 0 to pParamRokChoice.names.upperIndex if pParamRokChoice.names.value(iter) = year(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)) then pParamRokChoice.selected.value(iter) = true else pParamRokChoice.selected.value(iter) = false end if next
pParamArray.add pParamRokChoice #endif
set get_default_param = pParamArray end function
function scan_selection
dim pTmpDict : set pTmpDict = doc_.system.activex("scripting.dictionary") 'sortowanie slowanika dostawca/produkt set g_customer_array = doc_.afc.new_navoarray() set g_customer_array.Operations = new CNavoArraySupport
dim pBody : set pBody = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RESULT_TABLE).body dim pRow dim pDostProd for each pRow in pBody with pRow.cell(2).element(1) if .value = "1" then pTmpDict.Add .userprop.prop(PRIV_PROP_IDOPAK),.userprop 'tablica dostawcow/produktow - do grupowania zamowien set pDostProd = new CDostProd pDostProd.m_idProd = clng(.userprop.prop(PRIV_PROP_IDPROD)) pDostProd.m_idOpak = clng(.userprop.prop(PRIV_PROP_IDOPAK)) pDostProd.m_idDostawca = clng(.userprop.prop(PRIV_PROP_CUSTOMER)) g_customer_array.add pDostProd end if end with next 'posortujemy g_customer_array po dostawcy g_customer_array.Sort set scan_selection = pTmpDict end function
dim g_customer_array
class CDostProd public m_iddostawca public m_idProd public m_idOpak end class
class CNavoArraySupport
public mvarAnotherArray
'----------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Zamień dwa elementy ze sobą '----------------------------------------------------------------------- public function swapelements(byref pnavoarray, byref nindexelem1, byref nindexelem2) dim varElem
set varElem = pNavoArray.Value(nIndexElem1) set pNavoArray.Value(nIndexElem1) = pNavoArray.Value(nIndexElem2) set pNavoArray.Value(nIndexElem2) = varElem end function
'----------------------------------------------------------------------- 'Czy element elem1 jest < elem2 '----------------------------------------------------------------------- public function less(byval elem1, byval elem2) Less = (elem1.m_iddostawca < elem2.m_iddostawca) end function
'----------------------------------------------------------------------- 'Czy element elem1 jest > elem2 '----------------------------------------------------------------------- public function more(byval elem1, byval elem2) More = (elem1.m_iddostawca > elem2.m_iddostawca) end function
'----------------------------------------------------------------------- 'Czy element elem1 jest = elem2 '----------------------------------------------------------------------- public function equal(byval elem1, byval elem2) Equal = (elem1.m_iddostawca = elem2.m_iddostawca) end function
end class
function array_2_in_str(byref pProdDict) dim strIn : strIn = "(0" dim iter dim pKeys : pKeys = pProdDict.Keys for iter = 0 to pProdDict.count - 1 strIn = strIn + "," + cstr(pKeys(iter)) next array_2_in_str = strIn + ")" end function
function set_cursor_position(byref rs , byval idProdukt , byval idOpak ) rs.movefirst dim ustawiony:ustawiony = false do while not ustawiony if clng(rs("p_idobj")) = idProdukt and idOpak = clng(rs("c_idobj")) then ustawiony = true else rs.movenext end if loop end function
function create_zam_wl
dim pProdDict : set pProdDict = scan_selection() if pProdDict.count = 0 then MessageBox "Nie wybrano żadnego towaru", "Kreator zamówień własnych", vbOKOnly, vbInformation exit function end if
dim pCursor : set pCursor = trans_.createadors( _ "select p_idobj,c_idobj from vlist_n5produkt_listopakowania where c_idobj in " + array_2_in_str(pProdDict) +_ " order by p_idobj , coll_lp ") dim idLastDost : idLastDost = -1 dim pFormZamWl : set pFormZamWl = nothing
dim iter for iter = 0 to g_customer_array.UpperIndex 'iterujem,y sie po posortowanej by customer tablicy 'ustawiamy kursor na odpowiednim produkcie/opakowaniu set_cursor_position pCursor , g_customer_array.value(iter).m_idProd , g_customer_array.value(iter).m_idOpak
dim idProd : idProd = clng(pCursor("p_idobj")) dim idOpak : idOpak = clng(pCursor("c_idobj")) dim pUserProp : set pUserProp = pProdDict.Item(idOpak) dim idDost : idDost = clng(pUserProp.prop(PRIV_PROP_CUSTOMER))
if idDost <> 0 then if idDost <> idLastDost then if idLastDost <> -1 then 'zakończ zamówienie pFormZamWl.domodalauto() set pFormZamWl = nothing end if if pFormZamWl is nothing then 'rozpocznij zamowienie trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = clng(N5REJESTRDOK__ZAM_WLASNE) dim pOpenFormZamWl : set pOpenFormZamWl = doc_.getmodule(60129).prepare_form_open_command(TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE,0,0) if pOpenFormZamWl is nothing then exit function end if set pFormZamWl = doc_.getpagehli(pOpenFormZamWl) if pFormZamWl is nothing then exit function end if end if idLastDost = idDost if idDost <> 0 then set pFormZamWl.root.pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,idDost) end if end if
if ccur(page_.ctrl(pUserProp.prop(PRIV_PROP_CTRL_ILOSC)).value) > 0 then dim pPozZam : set pPozZam = pFormZamWl.root.listPozycje.addnew() with pPozZam set .pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,idProd) set .pOpak = .pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(.pProdukt.listOpakowania.findonid(idOpak))
'dim curIlosc : curIlosc = - ccur(pUserProp.prop(PRIV_PROP_PROGNOZA1)) dim curIlosc : curIlosc = ccur(page_.ctrl(pUserProp.prop(PRIV_PROP_CTRL_ILOSC)).value) if curIlosc < ccur(0.0) then curIlosc = ccur(0.0) end if .curIloscOpak = curIlosc end with end if end if next
' pCursor.MoveNext ' loop '----------------
if idLastDost <> -1 then 'zakończ zamówienie pFormZamWl.domodalauto() set pFormZamWl = nothing end if end function
function create_zlprod dim pProdDict : set pProdDict = scan_selection() if pProdDict.count = 0 then MessageBox "Nie wybrano żadnego towaru", "Kreator zleceń produkcyjnych", vbOKOnly, vbInformation exit function end if dim pOpenFormZP : set pOpenFormZP = doc_.getmodule(60129).prepare_form_open_command(TYPEID_N5ZLECPROD,0,0) if pOpenFormZP is nothing then exit function end if dim pFormZP : set pFormZP = doc_.getpagehli(pOpenFormZP) if pFormZP is nothing then exit function end if
dim iter dim pKeys : pKeys = pProdDict.Keys for iter = 0 to pProdDict.count - 1 dim idOpak : idOpak = clng(pKeys(iter)) dim pUserProp : set pUserProp = pProdDict.Item(idOpak) dim pProdukt : set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,clng(pUserProp.prop(PRIV_PROP_IDPROD))) if pProdukt.prod_cWyrob = "1" then
if ccur(page_.ctrl(pUserProp.prop(PRIV_PROP_CTRL_ILOSC)).value) > 0 then dim pPozZP : set pPozZP = pFormZP.root.listPozycje.addnew() with pPozZP set .pProdukt = pProdukt set .pOpak = .pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(.pProdukt.listOpakowania.findonid(idOpak)) 'dim curIlosc : curIlosc = - ccur(pUserProp.prop(PRIV_PROP_PROGNOZA1)) dim curIlosc : curIlosc = ccur(page_.ctrl(pUserProp.prop(PRIV_PROP_CTRL_ILOSC)).value) if curIlosc < ccur(0.0) then curIlosc = ccur(0.0) end if .curIloscOpak = curIlosc end with end if
end if next pFormZP.domodalauto() end function
function c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_IL_ZAP##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) : c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_IL_ZAP##_ongetdata = true end function
function c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_IL_ZAP##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_IL_ZAP##_ondataentered = true
g_curSumIlZap = g_curSumIlZap - g_oIloscDict.Item(oCtrl.ident) + newValue g_oIloscDict.Item(oCtrl.ident) = newValue end function
function c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) page_.ctrl(oCtrl.userprop.prop(PRIV_PROP_CTRL_ILOSC)).disable = (oCtrl.value = "0") c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX##_ongetdata = true end function
function c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX##_ondataentered = true
if newValue = "0" then g_curSumIlZap = g_curSumIlZap - g_oIloscDict.Item( oCtrl.userprop.prop(PRIV_PROP_CTRL_ILOSC) ) else g_curSumIlZap = g_curSumIlZap + g_oIloscDict.Item( oCtrl.userprop.prop(PRIV_PROP_CTRL_ILOSC) ) end if end function
function c##CTRLID_SUMA_IL_ZAP##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) : c##CTRLID_SUMA_IL_ZAP##_ongetdata = true oCtrl.value = nx_.display.quantity(g_curSumIlZap,"",g_iMaxPrec) end function
function on_apply_factor() dim curFactor : curFactor = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_FACTOR).value page_.ctrl(CTRLID_FACTOR).value = ccur(100.0) if curFactor <> ccur(100.0) then dim pProdDict : set pProdDict = scan_selection()
dim iter dim pKeys : pKeys = pProdDict.Keys for iter = 0 to pProdDict.count - 1 dim idOpak : idOpak = clng(pKeys(iter)) dim pUserProp : set pUserProp = pProdDict.Item(idOpak) dim iCtrlIlosc : iCtrlIlosc = pUserProp.prop(PRIV_PROP_CTRL_ILOSC) dim iPrecision : iPrecision = page_.ctrl(iCtrlIlosc).precision dim curOldIlosc : curOldIlosc = g_oIloscDict.Item( iCtrlIlosc ) dim curNewIlosc : curNewIlosc = doc_.afc.convert.roundn(curOldIlosc * curFactor / ccur(100.0),iPrecision) if curNewIlosc <> curOldIlosc then page_.ctrl(iCtrlIlosc).value = curNewIlosc g_curSumIlZap = g_curSumIlZap - g_oIloscDict.Item(iCtrlIlosc) + curNewIlosc g_oIloscDict.Item(iCtrlIlosc) = curNewIlosc end if next end if end function

thead.tr:
LP
C_FIELD_FIRST_HUMANNAME
C_FIELD_SECOND_HUMANNAME
#ifdef APPCONFIG_ZAMOWIENIE_SHOW_CECHA1
Marka
#endif
J.m.
Stan mag.
Zamó- wienia obce
Na prod.
Bilans
Zamó- wienia własne
Z pro- dukcji
Stan min.
Stan max.
Prognoza
Ilosc zapotrze- bowania
Dostawca
